title: agropyron intermedium var. savignonei
intro: Agropyron intermedium var. savignonei is a plant species, also known as a type of wild wheat or intermediate wheatgrass, which is a perennial grass native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Agropyron intermedium var. savignonei include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. However, I couldn't find any specific information on herbal preparations for this plant, suggesting it may require further research for its potential applications.
